inputs.invoice_data: Client: NovaTech MENA (Layla Haddad, CEO). Invoice #NMC-2026-0051. Services: AI Sales Automation Suite Setup ($12,000), Monthly Management Fee - First Month ($3,500), Custom CRM Integration ($6,500). Total: $22,000. Payment terms: 50 percent upfront, 50 percent on delivery. First payment due: $11,000.
